compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: Repo change pushed as Gerrit #666 (stacked on d0e5 #665). Live-ops SEQUENCING (from plan-review advisory): the running box's fetch-secrets.sh fail-fasts on a blank autolander-gerrit-token, so the code change (#666, which removes that fetch) MUST be deployed to the host BEFORE 'terraform apply' destroys the /rebar/prod/autolander-gerrit-token SSM param — else a boot/redeploy would fail-fast. Order: (1) land #666 -> autodeploy syncs new fetch-secrets to box; (2) docker compose up -d --remove-orphans to drop the autolander+autoheal containers; remove gerrit_autolander* volumes; (3) terraform apply to destroy rebar-autolander-errors alarm + the SSM param. Bot stays PAUSED throughout (being deleted).

compiled_state.description:
## Why
Remove the running auto-lander and all its cloud/host resources — cost + no longer used.
## What (repo)
- [ ] infra/compose/Dockerfile.autolander — delete.
- [ ] infra/compose/docker-compose.yml — remove the autolander service, autoheal sidecar (if only for it), and gerrit_autolander + gerrit_autolander_tickets external volumes.
- [ ] infra/scripts/compose-up.sh — remove autolander + autolander-tickets from SITE_SUBDIRS.
- [ ] infra/scripts/fetch-secrets.sh — remove autolander-gerrit-token fetch.
- [ ] infra/scripts/autodeploy.sh — remove AUTOLANDER_* build/deploy paths.
- [ ] infra/terraform: delete monitoring_autolander.tf; remove the autolander-gerrit-token param from ssm.tf.
- [ ] infra/nginx: remove the /autolander/status location.
- [ ] infra/scripts/observability.sh — remove autolander_errors marker feed.
## What (live — operator, staged, careful)
- [ ] docker compose: stop+remove the autolander container + autoheal; remove gerrit_autolander* volumes.
- [ ] terraform apply: destroy the rebar-autolander-errors CloudWatch alarm + the SSM autolander-gerrit-token param (via the deleted .tf) — frontier creds, quiet window.
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] [operator-attested] no autolander container/volumes/alarm/SSM-param remain in AWS; the host stack comes up clean without them.
- [ ] terraform plan is empty after apply; make lint/typecheck/test green.
compiled_state.title: Decommission deployed auto-lander infra (container, compose, terraform, SSM, alarm, nginx)
